entry.title: [CA/APAC][Control panel & API] - Control panel Incident Notification
entry.content:
Jul 14, 19:30 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Control panel & API offering has been resolved.

Start time : 14/07/2026 09:00 UTC
End time : 14/07/2026 17:00 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a software issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jul 14, 16:26 UTC
Investigating - We are currently investigating an incident affecting our Control panel & API offering, which is causing temporary availability issue in the CA and APAC regions.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 14/07/2026 09:00 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Payment transactions on CA and APAC subscriptions are not triggering the automatic service reactivation.
Customers Impact : Customers may experience payment issues on subscriptions; successful transactions are not reactivating services.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident and fix it.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

entry.title: [CA][Control panel & API] - Control panel incident notification
entry.content:
Jul 9, 09:26 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Control panel & API offering has been resolved.

Start time : 09/07/2026 08:44 UTC
End time : 09/07/2026 09:20 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a network equipment issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jul 9, 09:07 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an incident affecting our Control panel & API service in CA Region.

Here is detail for this incident :
Start time : 09/07/2026 08:44 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : High response times have been detected on API impacting Canadian Customer Panel, especially VPS section.
Customers Impact : Customers may experience slowness on their customers panel on VPS section.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident to fix it. 

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.
We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

entry.title: [GLOBAL][Customer Service] - ServiceNow maintenance notification
entry.content:
Jul 4, 08:06 UTC
Completed - All services are operational.

Jul 4, 06:00 UTC
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Jun 27, 06:55 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our ServiceNow service.

Start time : 04/07/2026 06:00 UTC
End time : 04/07/2026 08:00 UTC
Service impact : No service disruption is expected during this maintenance window.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be performing maintenance on our ServiceNow service to enhance its reliability and performance.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [GLOBAL][Corporate websites] - Soyoustart/Kimsufi websites incident notification
entry.content:
Jun 10, 12:42 UTC
Resolved - We had an incident on Corporate websites offer on Soyoustart and Kimsufi websites which has now been resolved.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 10/06/2026 12:08 UTC
End time : 10/06/2026 12:34 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Soyoustart(https://www.soyoustart.com) and Kimsufi(https://www.kimsufi.com) websites were temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Customers were temporarily unable to access our Kimsufi and Soyoustart websites.
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a software issue.

We thank you for your understanding and patience throughout this incident.

entry.title: [EU][Control panel & API] - Manager Incident Notification
entry.content:
Jun 10, 09:32 UTC
Resolved - We had an incident on Control panel & API offer in EU region which has now been resolved.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 10/06/2026 08:54 UTC
End time : 10/06/2026 09:08 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : The Manager returned an HTTP 500 error in the EU region.
Customers Impact : Customers were temporarily unable to retrieve or list their DNS zones.
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a software issue.

We thank you for your understanding and patience throughout this incident.

entry.title: [EU/CA][Control panel & API] - APIv6 / Manager incident notification
entry.content:
Jun 4, 14:19 UTC
Resolved - We had an incident on Control panel & API offer in EU and CA regions which has now been resolved.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 04/06/2026 13:32 UTC
End time : 04/06/2026 13:49 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : The APIv6 / Manager returned an HTTP 500 error in the EU and CA regions.
Customers Impact : Customers were temporarily unable to retrieve or list their DNS zones.
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a software issue.

We thank you for your understanding and patience throughout this incident.

entry.title: [CA/APAC][Control panel & API] - API Incident Notification
entry.content:
May 25, 18:03 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Control panel & API offering has been resolved.

Start time : 25/05/2026 10:01 UTC
End time : 25/05/2026 12:25 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a software issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

May 25, 12:27 UTC
Monitoring - Service has been fully restored since 25/05/2026 12:25 UTC. Monitoring remains active to ensure long-term stability.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 25/05/2026 10:01 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : The OVHcloud API (ca.api.ovh.com) and the Control panel are currently experiencing high latency.
Customers Impact : Customers may experience latency or have connectivity issues with the control panel and the API.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

May 25, 10:41 UTC
Investigating - We are currently investigating an incident affecting our Control panel & API offering, which is causing temporary availability issue in the CA/APAC regions.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 25/05/2026 10:01 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : The OVHcloud API (ca.api.ovh.com) and the Control panel are currently experiencing high latency.
Customers Impact : Customers may experience latency or have connectivity issues with the control panel and the API.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident and fix it.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

entry.title: [GLOBAL][Control panel] - cPanel incident notification
entry.content:
May 5, 11:39 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Control panel has been resolved.

Start time : 01/05/2026 00:00 UTC
End time : 04/05/2026 14:54 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by our provider.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

May 1, 22:57 UTC
Investigating - We are currently experiencing an incident affecting our Control Panel offering (cPanel & WHM)

Please find the details of this incident below :
Start time : 01/05/2026 00:00 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : cPanel & WHM Control Panel.
Customers Impact : Customers may experience security risks on servers running cPanel & WHM.

To immediately address and protect from any security concerns, OVHcloud teams highly recommends anyone using a cPanel image to execute the recommended patch, as described by cPanel, on the CVE documentation.

https://support.cpanel.net/hc/en-us/articles/40073787579671-Security-CVE-2026-41940-cPanel-WHM-WP2-Security-Update-04-28-2026

If you are using an OVHcloud provided cPanel template, please be advised that our image is not yet patched.
If you need to reinstall your template for any reason between now and our patches being applied, you will need to execute the recommended steps to patch again, to ensure you remain secure.

We will update here as soon as our cPanel templates are patched.
We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.
We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

entry.title: [Global][Support] - Help Center Incident Notification
entry.content:
May 5, 09:25 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Support Help Center offering has been resolved.

Start time : 04/05/2026 09:32 UTC
End time : 04/05/2026 10:09 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a software issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

May 4, 10:17 UTC
Monitoring - Service has been fully restored since 04/05/2026 10:09 UTC. Monitoring remains active to ensure long-term stability.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 04/05/2026 09:32 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Support Help Center was temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Customers were temporarily unable to access Help Center Services.
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a software issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

May 4, 10:09 UTC
Identified - We have determined the origin of the issue affecting our Help Center service.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 04/05/2026 09:32 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Support Help Center is temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access Help Center Services.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by a software issue.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible. We estimated that the service will be fully restored by 10:30 UTC today.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

May 4, 09:44 UTC
Investigating - We are currently experiencing an incident affecting our Help Center offer.

Start time : 04/05/2026 09:32 UTC

Our teams are fully committed to investigating this issue and working towards a resolution as soon as possible. As investigations are ongoing, we will share any new findings or updates with you as soon as possible.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

entry.title: [GLOBAL][Support] - Help Center - Community portal maintenance notification
entry.content:
Apr 25, 07:17 UTC
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

Apr 25, 06:00 UTC
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Apr 14, 08:33 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Support offer.

Start time : 25/04/2026 06:00 UTC
End time : 25/04/2026 07:30 UTC
Service impact : Help Center, Community portals and Live Chat access could be temporarily degraded or temporarily down due to possible slowness during this maintenance.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will update the application to improve security and stability.
Workaround : If you have a Business or Enterprise level of support, your dedicated phone number is available to reach your technical advisor in case of emergency.
You can also access our documentation directly on our GitHub repository : https://github.com/ovh/docs/blob/develop/pages/index.md

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [EU][Customer service] API unreachable
entry.content:
Mar 31, 14:19 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Control panel & API has been resolved.

Start time : 31/03/2026 13:41 UTC
End time : 31/03/2026 13:52 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a software issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Mar 31, 13:55 UTC
Investigating - Start time: 31/03/2026 13:41 UTC
Service impact: OVHcloud API is temporarily unreachable impacting services management from Customer Panel, OVHcloud API (eu.api.ovh.com) and Order funnel.
This has no impact on your infrastructures health.
Our technical teams are working on the issue. Update will be posted as significant progress is made.

entry.title: [Global][Customer Service] - Live Chat incident notification
entry.content:
Mar 30, 14:43 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Support Live Chat service has been resolved.

Start time : 30/03/2026 13:20 UTC
End time : 30/03/2026 14:40 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a software issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Mar 30, 13:59 UTC
Identified - We have determined the origin of the incident affecting our Support Live Chat service.

Here is detail for this incident :
Start time : 30/03/2026 13:20 UTC
Service impact : Live Chat is temporarily unavailable.
Customers impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access our live chat to contact support.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by a software issue.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

Customers can contact support via phone or through the Help Center.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.
We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

entry.title: [CA][Control panel & API] - Kimsufi control panel incident notification
entry.content:
Mar 18, 20:18 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Control panel & API offering has been resolved.

Start time : 17/03/2026 12:19 UTC
End time : 18/03/2026 18:15 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a software issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Mar 17, 12:29 UTC
Investigating - We are currently investigating an incident affecting our Control panel & API offering, which is causing temporary availability issue in the Kimsufi manager portal in CA region.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 17/03/2026 12:19 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : The Kimsufi CA website is temporarily no longer redirecting to the Kimsufi CA manager portal.
Customers Impact : Kimsufi customers with Canadian accounts are temporarily unable to access their manager portal through the Kimsufi website.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident and fix it.
Workaround : Customers can use the following link: https://ca.kimsufi.com/manager/#/login to access the Kimsufi manager portal.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

entry.title: [EU/CA][Customer service] API/Control panel/Order funnel degraded service
entry.content:
Mar 18, 17:16 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Customer Panel, OVHcloud API (eu.api.ovh.com, ca.api.ovh.com) and Order funnel has been resolved.

Start time : 18/02/2026 16:26 UTC
End time : 18/02/2026 16:47 UTC

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Mar 18, 16:44 UTC
Investigating - Start time: 18/03/2026 16:26 UTC
Service impact: High error rates have been detected on API impacting Customer Panel, OVHcloud API (eu.api.ovh.com, ca.api.ovh.com) and Order funnel.
Our technical teams are working on the issue. Update will be posted as significant progress is made.

entry.title: [GLOBAL][Control panel & API] - Manager secret app Incident Notification
entry.content:
Mar 16, 18:34 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Control panel & API has been resolved.

Start time : 16/03/2026 15:00 UTC
End time : 16/03/2026 18:23 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a software issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Mar 16, 18:05 UTC
Identified - We have new information regarding the incident that affected your service(s).

Please find below an update on the situation:
Update : Our teams have identified the cause of the incident, and we are currently working to resolve it.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Mar 16, 17:27 UTC
Investigating - We are currently investigating an incident affecting our Control panel & API offering, which is causing temporary availability issue.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 16/03/2026 15:00 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Manager secret app (https://www.ovh.com/manager/secret/) is temporarily unavalable
Customers Impact : The customers credentials link returns Error 404 for Baremetal rescue emails ,OS installation emails and accessing VPS
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident and fix it.
Workaround : Customers can use https://eu.api.ovh.com/console/?section=%2Fsecret&branch=v1#post-/secret/retrieve with the UUID and they'll get the password. This API route does not require authentication.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

entry.title: API - scheduled deletion of deprecated API routes (GET /order/catalog/formatted/cloud)
entry.content:
Mar 2, 16:30 UTC
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

Sep 17, 13:21 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, a maintenance is scheduled on our API endpoints (https://eu.api.ovh.com, https://ca.api.ovh.com).

Start time : 02/03/2026 09:00 UTC
End time : 02/03/2026 09:02 UTC
Maintenance : Scheduled deletion of deprecated API routes will be performed.
Service impact : Impacted API routes are GET /order/catalog/formatted/cloud.
Service improvement : The deprecated API routes are replaced by a new API route that provide the same level of features:
